title: Viners Barware Round Silicone Ice Mould
features: ICE MOULD GIFTBOX - Add a dash of glamour to your glass with an ice ball. The silicone ice mould comes in a gift box and shapes up to four round ice spheres to cool your drink. It is ideal for lovers of whiskey, bourbon and scotch

ELEGANT DESIGN - Create up to 4 x ice spheres each measuring 4.5cm which melt slowly, keeping drinks cold without diluting them. The mould fits together to create a leak-proof seal and fills easily from the top, letting water freeze without cracking

QUALITY MATERIALS - This ice tray is crafted with high-quality silicone that is food safe and effective at freezing any liquids. Each tray is easy to clean off quickly, freezer safe, and dishwasher safe. Wash before first use

BARWARE RANGE - Entertain, create and serve with flair and quality thanks to the Viners Barware Collection. Our range has all the tools to professionally entertain guests at home, from bottle storage to cocktail shakers, stirrers, and straws

VINERS ELEGANCE - Viners has existed for over 110 years and has become a much-loved British brand and household name, steeped in heritage. We pride ourselves on delivering excellence - elegant, robust barware made from the finest quality materials
description: From the manufacturer Single Wall Ice Bucket Long Steel Drinking Straws Gift Box Waiter's Friend Bottle Stopper Cocktail Stirrers 6PCE Set Everyday Set of 6 Steak Knives Add To Basket Add To Basket Add To Basket Add To Basket Add To Basket Add To Basket Customer Reviews 3.7 out of 5 stars 9 5.0 out of 5 stars 2 4.5 out of 5 stars 162 1.0 out of 5 stars 1 5.0 out of 5 stars 5 4.5 out of 5 stars 394 Price £8.75 £ 8 . 75 £3.15 £ 3 . 15 £4.00 £ 4 . 00 £4.20 £ 4 . 20 £7.82 £ 7 . 82 £11.94 £ 11 . 94 Description This versatile ice bucket is great for holding ice or storing freshly prepared fruits. Finished in high quality stainless steel, this bucket will add style and elegance to your barware collection. Reduce plastic waste by using these reusable and durable long stainless steel straws. Supplied with a cleaning brush, the straws are easy to clean and can be used time and time again. The double-lever hinge easily extracts the cork from the bottle in two swift steps. The neat, retractable blade removes foil protection from bottles. It also features a handy, easy to open bottle cap remover. The triangular shaped stainless steel bottle stopper with rubber sealing rings will create an air tight seal on a variety of different bottle shapes, keeping the contents fresher for longer. Mix your favourite cocktail and add a glamorous finish to your hiball glass with these elegant stainless steel cocktail stirrers. These knives effortlessly cut all meats. Crafted from quality stainless steel and non-stick coating, the serrated blades provide strength and durability. The curved handle, soft-touch handles provide maximum comfort and added grip.
